form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 3 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Beau Steele at this track over 2138m in a 3yo+ NR up to 40 on March 27 at $12. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind Warrawee Flyer at this track over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 42 on March 31 at $9. Bursting to win one and gets his chance from this draw.
